title: eArchery
description: A tiny archery arcade proof of concept: the target moves, click where the arrow lands, and score the impact.

arena.title: Moving target
arena.help: Click in the arena to shoot. The impact is scored against the target position at click time.
arena.idle: Start the game to unlock the target.
arena.finished: Game finished. Restart to shoot again.

history.title: Shots
history.empty: No arrow shot yet. Even Robin Hood started somewhere.

messages.ready: Ready. Keep it simple: moving target, one click, one score.
messages.perfect: Perfect shot. The target is filing a complaint.
messages.hit: Hit. Not pretty, but it counts.
messages.miss: Miss. The grass is safe, probably.
messages.finished: Round finished. MVP validated, ego optionally damaged.
